nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Greetings, brother! I am Qiao Feng, Chief of the Beggar's Sect. Seeing your righteous bearing, you must be a hero of Jianghu?

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Though I'm known for martial arts, I'm also quite knowledgeable about Go. I've heard you meet friends through Go - how about we compete in a game?

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: My Go style is fierce and forceful, relying on momentum to overwhelm. If you have the courage, face me in a game.

options.text: Chief Qiao, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Good! You have courage! If you want to see my style, you must play a game with me first.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: I've roamed Jianghu for many years and never met a true opponent. If you can beat me, it proves you're qualified.

options.text: Please bestow your teaching, Chief Qiao!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Good! Come! Let you witness the power of the Beggar's Sect!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged. When I was learning martial arts, I also endured many hardships. Practice more and you'll surely succeed.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: I've acted with righteousness all my life, but also suffered greatly from the mystery of my origins. Sometimes I think, life is like Go - every move requires deep thought.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: But no matter what, I'll hold fast to my beliefs. A true man stands tall between heaven and earth, with a clear conscience!

options.text: Chief Qiao, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: No problem, come back when you're ready. I'll be here, waiting anytime!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Until we meet again! May your chivalrous fame spread far in Jianghu!
